response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable generalist full-stack engineer with 17+ years of experience and solid distributed systems exposure, but the resume shows no evidence of the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or growth measurement systems. The role is Principal/IC6 with a specific focus on experimentation quality, bias detection, and rollout-risk management — none of which appear anywhere in the candidate's history. Additionally, the candidate has been on a career gap since October 2025 and prior tenures cap at Senior/Staff level.
strengths: 17+ years of polyglot engineering across distributed systems, embedded, web, and mobile — demonstrates broad adaptability and longevity
High-scale production experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O architecture
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and community knowledge-sharing through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or bias/guardrail system work found anywhere in the resume
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering background — the role's core technical pillars are entirely absent from the candidate's history
Active career gap since October 2025 combined with a seniority ceiling at Senior/Staff level, falling short of the Principal/IC6 scope and cross-team influence expectations

key_factors.factor: No telemetry or growth measurement systems experience
